title: Freshdesk Ticket
description: A support ticket in the Freshdesk helpdesk platform, representing a customer inquiry or issue that agents resolve through the support workflow.

id.description: Unique identifier of the ticket, auto-generated by Freshdesk.

description.description: HTML content of the ticket description.

description_text.description: Plain-text content of the ticket description.

source.description: Channel through which the ticket was created. 1=Email, 2=Portal, 3=Phone, 7=Chat, 9=Feedback Widget, 10=Outbound Email.

type.description: Category type of the ticket, e.g. Question, Incident, Problem, Feature Request.

requester_id.description: ID of the contact who raised the ticket.

responder_id.description: ID of the agent currently assigned to the ticket.

group_id.description: ID of the group the ticket is assigned to.

product_id.description: ID of the product associated with the ticket.

company_id.description: ID of the company associated with the ticket.

email_config_id.description: ID of the email configuration used for the ticket.

cc_emails.description: Email addresses CC'd on the ticket.

fwd_emails.description: Email addresses the ticket has been forwarded to.

to_emails.description: Email addresses in the To field.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values keyed by field name with cf_ prefix.

fr_escalated.description: Whether the ticket has been escalated for first response SLA breach.

spam.description: Whether the ticket has been marked as spam.

is_escalated.description: Whether the ticket has been escalated for resolution SLA breach.

due_by.description: Timestamp when the ticket resolution is due per the SLA.

fr_due_by.description: Timestamp when the first response is due per the SLA.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the ticket was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the ticket was last updated.

Attachment.description: A file attached to a ticket or conversation.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the attachment was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the attachment was last updated.
